title: Vacuuming a WAL database resets the file header read and write versions to 1.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float64 DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC;
key_bug_features: Vacuuming a WAL database resets file header versions
